You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.01 (commit: a24e5d1d).

## Issue to Resolve

[Reader IA] Show lists directly on dropdown menu if there are 2 or fewer
We are currently grouping the Lists in a "Lists" submenu independent of the number of lists the user has, but we should only show that submenu when the user has over 2 lists.

So if the user has 2 or fewer, they should be displayed directly in the menu root.

![image](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/assets/5091503/57e663d9-218f-4a58-a447-05a86406ea86)

Internal ref: pcdRpT-4tr-p2#comment-7237

- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`

 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 59→                }
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 64→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 65→            id = id,
 66→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 67→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 68→        )
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 72→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 73→            id = id,
 74→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 75→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 80→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 81→            id = id,
 82→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 83→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 84→        )
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 88→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 89→            id = id,
 90→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 91→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 92→        )
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 96→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 97→            id = id,
 98→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 99→        )
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
103→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
104→            id = id,
105→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
106→        )
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
110→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
111→            id = id,
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
113→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
118→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
119→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
120→            customListsMenuItems.add(
121→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
124→                )
125→            )
126→        }
127→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
128→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
130→            id = "custom-lists",
131→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
132→            children = customListsMenuItems,
133→        )
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
137→
138→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
139→}

 3→import androidx.annotation.DrawableRes

 5→
 6→sealed interface MenuElementData {
 7→    data object Divider : MenuElementData
 8→
 9→    sealed class Item(
10→        open val id: String,
11→        open val text: UiString,
12→        @DrawableRes open val leadingIcon: Int,
13→    ) : MenuElementData {
14→        // Item element that closes the menu when clicked
15→        data class Single(
16→            override val id: String,
17→            override val text: UiString,
18→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
19→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
20→
21→        // Sub-menu element that opens a sub-menu when clicked
22→        data class SubMenu(
23→            override val id: String,
24→            override val text: UiString,
25→            val children: List<MenuElementData>,
26→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
27→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
28→    }
29→}
30→
31→internal const val NO_ICON = -1

 19→        readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig = readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 20→    )
 21→
 22→    @Test
 23→    fun `GIVEN 1 custom list WHEN createMenu THEN it is shown directly`() {
 24→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 25→
 26→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 27→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 28→        }
 29→
 30→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 31→
 32→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 33→
 34→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 35→        assertThat(customList1Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-1"))
 36→
 37→        val customListsSubMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 38→        assertThat(customListsSubMenu).isNull()
 39→    }
 40→
 41→    @Test
 42→    fun `GIVEN 2 custom lists WHEN createMenu THEN they are shown directly`() {
 43→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 44→
 45→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 46→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 47→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 1
 48→        }
 49→
 50→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 51→
 52→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 53→
 54→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 55→        assertThat(customList1Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-1"))
 56→
 57→        val customList2Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "1" }!!
 58→        assertThat(customList2Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-2"))
 59→
 60→        val customListsSubMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 61→        assertThat(customListsSubMenu).isNull()
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    @Test
 65→    fun `GIVEN 3 custom lists WHEN createMenu THEN they are shown in a submenu`() {
 66→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 67→
 68→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 69→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0

 81→
 82→        val customList1Item = customListsSubMenu.children.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 83→        assertThat(customList1Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-1"))
 84→    }

273→    private fun isSearchSupported() = accountStore.hasAccessToken()
274→
275→    private fun isSettingsSupported() = accountStore.hasAccessToken()
276→
277→    private fun trackReaderTabShownIfNecessary(it: ReaderTag) {
278→        trackReaderTabJob?.cancel()
279→        trackReaderTabJob = launch {
280→            // we need to add this throttle as it takes a few ms to select the last selected tab after app restart
281→            delay(TRACK_TAB_CHANGED_THROTTLE)
282→            readerTracker.trackReaderTabIfNecessary(ReaderTab.transformTagToTab(it))
283→        }
284→    }
285→
286→    /* QUICK START */
287→
288→    fun onQuickStartPromptDismissed() {
289→        isQuickStartPromptShown = false
290→    }
291→
292→    fun onQuickStartEventReceived(event: QuickStartEvent) {
293→        if (event.task == getFollowSiteTask()) startQuickStartFollowSiteTask()
294→    }
295→
296→    private fun startQuickStartFollowSiteTask() {
297→        val shortMessagePrompt = if (isSettingsSupported()) {
298→            R.string.quick_start_dialog_follow_sites_message_short_discover_and_subscriptions
299→        } else {
300→            R.string.quick_start_dialog_follow_sites_message_short_discover
301→        }
302→        isQuickStartPromptShown = true
303→        _quickStartPromptEvent.value = Event(
304→            QuickStartReaderPrompt(
305→                getFollowSiteTask(),
306→                shortMessagePrompt,
307→                QuickStartUtils.ICON_NOT_SET,
308→            )
309→        )
310→        completeQuickStartFollowSiteTaskIfNeeded()
311→    }
312→
313→    private fun completeQuickStartFollowSiteTaskIfNeeded() {
314→        if (quickStartRepository.isPendingTask(getFollowSiteTask())) {
315→            selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()?.let {
316→                quickStartRepository.completeTask(getFollowSiteTask())
317→            }
318→        }
319→    }
320→
321→    fun dismissQuickStartSnackbarIfNeeded() {
322→        if (isQuickStartPromptShown) snackbarSequencer.dismissLastSnackbar()
323→        isQuickStartPromptShown = false
324→    }
325→
326→    private fun getFollowSiteTask() =
327→        quickStartRepository.quickStartType.getTaskFromString(QuickStartStore.QUICK_START_FOLLOW_SITE_LABEL)
328→
329→    private fun selectedReaderTag(): ReaderTag? =
330→        _topBarUiState.value?.let {
331→            readerTagsList[readerTopBarMenuHelper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(it.selectedItem)]
332→        }
333→
334→    private suspend fun updateTopBarUiState(savedInstanceState: Bundle? = null) {
335→        withContext(bgDispatcher) {
336→            val menuItems = readerTopBarMenuHelper.createMenu(readerTagsList)
337→
338→            // if menu is exactly the same as before, don't update
339→            if (_topBarUiState.value?.menuItems == menuItems) return@withContext
340→
341→            // choose selected item, either from current, saved state, or persisted, falling back to first item
342→            val savedStateSelectedId = savedInstanceState?.getString(KEY_TOP_BAR_UI_STATE_SELECTED_ITEM_ID)
343→
344→            val persistedSelectedId = appPrefsWrapper.readerTopBarSelectedFeedItemId
345→
346→            val selectedItem = _topBarUiState.value?.selectedItem
347→                ?: menuItems.filterSingleItems()
348→                    .let { singleItems ->
349→                        singleItems.firstOrNull { it.id == savedStateSelectedId }
350→                            ?: singleItems.firstOrNull { it.id == persistedSelectedId }
351→                            ?: singleItems.first()
352→                    }
353→
354→            // if there's a selected item and filter state, also use the filter state, also try to use the saved state
355→            val savedStateFilterUiState = savedInstanceState
356→                ?.let {
357→                    BundleCompat.getParcelable(
358→                        it,
359→                        KEY_TOP_BAR_UI_STATE_FILTER_UI_STATE,
360→                        TopBarUiState.FilterUiState::class.java
361→                    )
362→                }
363→                ?.takeIf { selectedItem.id == savedStateSelectedId }
364→
365→            val filterUiState = _topBarUiState.value?.filterUiState
366→                ?.takeIf { _topBarUiState.value?.selectedItem != null }
367→                ?: savedStateFilterUiState
368→
369→            _topBarUiState.postValue(
370→                TopBarUiState(
371→                    menuItems = menuItems,
372→                    selectedItem = selectedItem,
373→                    filterUiState = filterUiState,
374→                    onDropdownMenuClick = ::onDropdownMenuClick,
375→                    isSearchActionVisible = isSearchSupported(),
376→                )
377→            )
378→        }
379→    }
380→
381→    private fun onDropdownMenuClick() {
382→        readerTracker.trackDropdownMenuOpened()
383→    }
384→
385→    private fun getMenuItemFromReaderTag(readerTag: ReaderTag): MenuElementData.Item.Single? =
386→        _topBarUiState.value?.menuItems
387→            // Selected menu item must be an Item.Single
388→            ?.filterSingleItems()
389→            // Find menu item based onn selected ReaderTag
390→            ?.find { readerTopBarMenuHelper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(it) == readerTagsList.indexOf(readerTag) }
391→
392→    private fun List<MenuElementData>.filterSingleItems(): List<MenuElementData.Item.Single> {
393→        val singleItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
394→        forEach {
395→            if (it is MenuElementData.Item.Single) {
396→                singleItems.add(it)
397→            } else if (it is MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu) {
398→                singleItems.addAll(it.children.filterIsInstance<MenuElementData.Item.Single>())
399→            }
400→        }
401→        return singleItems
402→    }
403→
404→    private fun updateReaderTagsList(readerTags: List<ReaderTag>) {
405→        readerTagsList.clear()
406→        readerTagsList.addAll(readerTags)
407→    }
408→
409→    fun onTopBarMenuItemClick(item: MenuElementData.Item.Single) {
410→        val selectedReaderTag = readerTagsList[readerTopBarMenuHelper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(item)]
411→
412→        // Avoid reloading a content stream that is already loaded
413→        if (item.id != _topBarUiState.value?.selectedItem?.id) {
414→            selectedReaderTag?.let { updateSelectedContent(it) }
415→        }
416→        if (selectedReaderTag != null) {
417→            readerTracker.trackDropdownMenuItemTapped(selectedReaderTag)
418→        }
419→    }
420→
421→    fun onSubFilterItemSelected(item: SubfilterListItem) {
422→        when (item) {
423→            is SubfilterListItem.SiteAll -> clearTopBarFilter()
424→            is SubfilterListItem.Site -> updateTopBarFilter(item.blog.name
425→                .ifEmpty { urlUtilsWrapper.removeScheme(item.blog.url.ifEmpty { "" }) }, ReaderFilterType.BLOG
426→            )
427→
428→            is SubfilterListItem.Tag -> updateTopBarFilter(item.tag.tagDisplayName, ReaderFilterType.TAG)
429→            else -> Unit // do nothing
430→        }
431→    }
432→
433→    private fun tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun(
434→        initialDelay: Long = 0L,
435→        retryTime: Long = 50L,
436→        maxRetries: Int = 10,
437→        runContext: CoroutineContext = mainDispatcher,
438→        block: suspend CoroutineScope.(topBarUiState: TopBarUiState) -> Unit
439→    ) {
440→        launch(bgDispatcher) {
441→            if (initialDelay > 0L) delay(initialDelay)
442→
443→            var remainingTries = maxRetries
444→            while (_topBarUiState.value == null && remainingTries > 0) {
445→                delay(retryTime)
446→                remainingTries--
447→            }
448→
449→            // only run the block if the topBarUiState is not null, otherwise do nothing
450→            _topBarUiState.value?.let { topBarUiState ->
451→                withContext(runContext) {
452→                    block(topBarUiState)
453→                }
454→            }
455→        }
456→    }
457→
458→    private fun clearTopBarFilter() {
459→        // small delay to achieve a fluid animation since other UI updates are happening
460→        tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun(initialDelay = FILTER_UPDATE_DELAY) { topBarUiState ->
461→            val filterUiState = topBarUiState.filterUiState?.copy(selectedItem = null)
462→            _topBarUiState.postValue(topBarUiState.copy(filterUiState = filterUiState))
463→        }
464→    }
465→
466→    private fun updateTopBarFilter(itemName: String, type: ReaderFilterType) {
467→        // small delay to achieve a fluid animation since other UI updates are happening
468→        tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun(initialDelay = FILTER_UPDATE_DELAY) { topBarUiState ->
469→            val filterUiState = topBarUiState.filterUiState
470→                ?.copy(selectedItem = ReaderFilterSelectedItem(UiStringText(itemName), type))
471→            _topBarUiState.postValue(topBarUiState.copy(filterUiState = filterUiState))
472→        }
473→    }
474→
475→    fun hideTopBarFilterGroup(readerTab: ReaderTag) = tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun { topBarUiState ->
476→        val readerTagIndex = readerTopBarMenuHelper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(topBarUiState.selectedItem)
477→        val selectedReaderTag = readerTagsList[readerTagIndex]
478→
479→        if (readerTab != selectedReaderTag) return@tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun
480→
481→        _topBarUiState.postValue(topBarUiState.copy(filterUiState = null))
482→    }
483→
484→    fun showTopBarFilterGroup(
485→        readerTab: ReaderTag,
486→        subFilterItems: List<SubfilterListItem>
487→    ) = tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun { topBarUiState ->
488→        val readerTagIndex = readerTopBarMenuHelper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(topBarUiState.selectedItem)
489→        val selectedReaderTag = readerTagsList[readerTagIndex]
490→
491→        if (readerTab != selectedReaderTag) return@tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun
492→
493→        val blogsFilterCount = subFilterItems.filterIsInstance<SubfilterListItem.Site>().size
494→        val tagsFilterCount = subFilterItems.filterIsInstance<SubfilterListItem.Tag>().size
495→
496→        val filterState = topBarUiState.filterUiState
497→            ?.copy(
498→                blogsFilterCount = blogsFilterCount,
499→                tagsFilterCount = tagsFilterCount,
500→                showBlogsFilter = shouldShowBlogsFilter(selectedReaderTag),
501→                showTagsFilter = shouldShowTagsFilter(selectedReaderTag),
502→            )
503→            ?: TopBarUiState.FilterUiState(
504→                blogsFilterCount = blogsFilterCount,
505→                tagsFilterCount = tagsFilterCount,
506→                showBlogsFilter = shouldShowBlogsFilter(selectedReaderTag),
507→                showTagsFilter = shouldShowTagsFilter(selectedReaderTag),
508→            )
509→
510→        _topBarUiState.postValue(
511→            topBarUiState.copy(filterUiState = filterState)
512→        )
513→    }
514→
515→    private fun shouldShowBlogsFilter(readerTag: ReaderTag): Boolean {
516→        return readerTag.isFilterable && !readerTag.isTags
517→    }
518→
519→    private fun shouldShowTagsFilter(readerTag: ReaderTag): Boolean {
520→        val showForFollowedSites = readerTag.isFollowedSites && !readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
521→        val showForTags = readerTag.isTags
522→
523→        return readerTag.isFilterable && (showForFollowedSites || showForTags)
524→    }
525→
526→    data class TopBarUiState(
527→        val menuItems: List<MenuElementData>,
528→        val selectedItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single,
529→        val filterUiState: FilterUiState? = null,
530→        val onDropdownMenuClick: () -> Unit,
531→        val isSearchActionVisible: Boolean = false,
532→    ) {
533→        @Parcelize
534→        data class FilterUiState(
535→            val blogsFilterCount: Int,
536→            val tagsFilterCount: Int,
537→            val selectedItem: ReaderFilterSelectedItem? = null,
538→            val showBlogsFilter: Boolean = blogsFilterCount > 0,
539→            val showTagsFilter: Boolean = tagsFilterCount > 0,
540→        ) : Parcelable
541→    }
542→
543→    sealed class ReaderUiState(
544→        val appBarExpanded: Boolean = false,
545→        val tabLayoutVisible: Boolean = false
546→    ) {
547→        data class ContentUiState(
548→            val tabUiStates: List<TabUiState>,
549→            val selectedReaderTag: ReaderTag?,
550→        ) : ReaderUiState(
551→            appBarExpanded = true,
552→            tabLayoutVisible = true
553→        ) {
554→            data class TabUiState(
555→                val label: UiString
556→            )
557→        }
558→    }
559→
560→    data class QuickStartReaderPrompt(
561→        val task: QuickStartTask,
562→        @StringRes val shortMessagePrompt: Int,
563→        @DrawableRes val iconId: Int,
564→        val duration: Int = QUICK_START_PROMPT_DURATION
565→    )
566→
567→    companion object {
568→        private const val QUICK_START_PROMPT_DURATION = 5000
569→        private const val FILTER_UPDATE_DELAY = 50L
570→
571→        private const val KEY_TOP_BAR_UI_STATE_SELECTED_ITEM_ID = "topBarUiState_selectedItem_id"
572→        private const val KEY_TOP_BAR_UI_STATE_FILTER_UI_STATE = "topBarUiState_filterUiState"
573→    }
574→}
575→
576→data class TabNavigation(val position: Int, val smoothAnimation: Boolean)

 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->

 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }

 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)

 59→                        customListsArray.forEach { index, readerTag ->
 60→                            add(

 62→                                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
 63→                                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
 64→                                )
 65→                            )
 66→                        }
 67→                    } else {
 68→                        add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 69→                    }
 70→                }
 71→        }
 72→    }

 95→        )

102→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
103→        )
104→    }

107→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
108→            id = id,
109→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
110→        )
111→    }

113→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
114→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
115→            id = id,
116→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
117→        )
118→    }
119→
120→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
121→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→            id = id,
123→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
124→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
125→        )
126→    }
127→
128→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
129→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
130→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
131→            customListsMenuItems.add(
132→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
133→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
134→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
135→                )
136→            )
137→        }
138→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
139→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
140→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
141→            id = "custom-lists",
142→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
143→            children = customListsMenuItems,
144→        )
145→    }
146→
147→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
148→
149→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
150→}

 16→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelperCustomListsTest {
 17→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig = mock()
 18→    val helper = ReaderTopBarMenuHelper(
 19→        readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig = readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 20→    )
 21→
 22→    @Test
 23→    fun `GIVEN 1 custom list WHEN createMenu THEN it is shown directly`() {
 24→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 25→
 26→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 27→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 28→        }
 29→
 30→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 31→
 32→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 33→
 34→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 35→        assertThat(customList1Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-1"))
 36→
 37→        val customListsSubMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 38→        assertThat(customListsSubMenu).isNull()
 39→    }
 40→
 41→    @Test
 42→    fun `GIVEN 2 custom lists WHEN createMenu THEN they are shown directly`() {
 43→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 44→
 45→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 46→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 47→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 1
 48→        }
 49→
 50→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 51→
 52→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 53→
 54→        val customList1Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 55→        assertThat(customList1Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-1"))
 56→
 57→        val customList2Item = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "1" }!!
 58→        assertThat(customList2Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-2"))
 59→
 60→        val customListsSubMenu = menu.findSubMenu()
 61→        assertThat(customListsSubMenu).isNull()
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    @Test
 65→    fun `GIVEN 3 custom lists WHEN createMenu THEN they are shown in a submenu`() {
 66→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 67→
 68→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 69→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 0
 70→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 1
 71→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-3")) // item 2
 72→        }
 73→
 74→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 75→
 76→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 77→
 78→        val customListsSubMenu = menu.findSubMenu()!!
 79→        assertThat(customListsSubMenu.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists))
 80→        assertThat(customListsSubMenu.children).hasSize(3)
 81→
 82→        val customList1Item = customListsSubMenu.children.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 83→        assertThat(customList1Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-1"))
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    private fun List<MenuElementData>.findSingleItem(
 87→        predicate: (MenuElementData.Item.Single) -> Boolean
 88→    ): MenuElementData.Item.Single? {
 89→        return find { it is MenuElementData.Item.Single && predicate(it) } as? MenuElementData.Item.Single
 90→    }

 93→        return find { it is MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu } as? MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu
 94→    }

334→    private suspend fun updateTopBarUiState(savedInstanceState: Bundle? = null) {
335→        withContext(bgDispatcher) {
336→            val menuItems = readerTopBarMenuHelper.createMenu(readerTagsList)
337→
338→            // if menu is exactly the same as before, don't update
339→            if (_topBarUiState.value?.menuItems == menuItems) return@withContext
340→
341→            // choose selected item, either from current, saved state, or persisted, falling back to first item
342→            val savedStateSelectedId = savedInstanceState?.getString(KEY_TOP_BAR_UI_STATE_SELECTED_ITEM_ID)
343→
344→            val persistedSelectedId = appPrefsWrapper.readerTopBarSelectedFeedItemId
345→
346→            val selectedItem = _topBarUiState.value?.selectedItem
347→                ?: menuItems.filterSingleItems()
348→                    .let { singleItems ->
349→                        singleItems.firstOrNull { it.id == savedStateSelectedId }
350→                            ?: singleItems.firstOrNull { it.id == persistedSelectedId }
351→                            ?: singleItems.first()
352→                    }
353→
354→            // if there's a selected item and filter state, also use the filter state, also try to use the saved state
355→            val savedStateFilterUiState = savedInstanceState
356→                ?.let {
357→                    BundleCompat.getParcelable(
358→                        it,
359→                        KEY_TOP_BAR_UI_STATE_FILTER_UI_STATE,
360→                        TopBarUiState.FilterUiState::class.java
361→                    )
362→                }
363→                ?.takeIf { selectedItem.id == savedStateSelectedId }
364→
365→            val filterUiState = _topBarUiState.value?.filterUiState
366→                ?.takeIf { _topBarUiState.value?.selectedItem != null }
367→                ?: savedStateFilterUiState
368→
369→            _topBarUiState.postValue(
370→                TopBarUiState(
371→                    menuItems = menuItems,
372→                    selectedItem = selectedItem,
373→                    filterUiState = filterUiState,
374→                    onDropdownMenuClick = ::onDropdownMenuClick,
375→                    isSearchActionVisible = isSearchSupported(),
376→                )
377→            )
378→        }
379→    }

433→    private fun tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun(
434→        initialDelay: Long = 0L,
435→        retryTime: Long = 50L,
436→        maxRetries: Int = 10,
437→        runContext: CoroutineContext = mainDispatcher,
438→        block: suspend CoroutineScope.(topBarUiState: TopBarUiState) -> Unit
439→    ) {
440→        launch(bgDispatcher) {
441→            if (initialDelay > 0L) delay(initialDelay)
442→
443→            var remainingTries = maxRetries
444→            while (_topBarUiState.value == null && remainingTries > 0) {
445→                delay(retryTime)
446→                remainingTries--
447→            }
448→
449→            // only run the block if the topBarUiState is not null, otherwise do nothing
450→            _topBarUiState.value?.let { topBarUiState ->
451→                withContext(runContext) {
452→                    block(topBarUiState)
453→                }
454→            }
455→        }
456→    }

489→        val selectedReaderTag = readerTagsList[readerTagIndex]
490→
491→        if (readerTab != selectedReaderTag) return@tryWaitNonNullTopBarUiStateThenRun
492→
493→        val blogsFilterCount = subFilterItems.filterIsInstance<SubfilterListItem.Site>().size
494→        val tagsFilterCount = subFilterItems.filterIsInstance<SubfilterListItem.Tag>().size
495→
496→        val filterState = topBarUiState.filterUiState
497→            ?.copy(
498→                blogsFilterCount = blogsFilterCount,
499→                tagsFilterCount = tagsFilterCount,
500→                showBlogsFilter = shouldShowBlogsFilter(selectedReaderTag),
501→                showTagsFilter = shouldShowTagsFilter(selectedReaderTag),
502→            )
503→            ?: TopBarUiState.FilterUiState(
504→                blogsFilterCount = blogsFilterCount,
505→                tagsFilterCount = tagsFilterCount,
506→                showBlogsFilter = shouldShowBlogsFilter(selectedReaderTag),
507→                showTagsFilter = shouldShowTagsFilter(selectedReaderTag),
508→            )
509→
510→        _topBarUiState.postValue(
511→            topBarUiState.copy(filterUiState = filterState)
512→        )
513→    }
514→
515→    private fun shouldShowBlogsFilter(readerTag: ReaderTag): Boolean {
516→        return readerTag.isFilterable && !readerTag.isTags
517→    }
518→
519→    private fun shouldShowTagsFilter(readerTag: ReaderTag): Boolean {
520→        val showForFollowedSites = readerTag.isFollowedSites && !readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
521→        val showForTags = readerTag.isTags
522→
523→        return readerTag.isFilterable && (showForFollowedSites || showForTags)
524→    }

527→        val menuItems: List<MenuElementData>,

531→        val isSearchActionVisible: Boolean = false,

538→            val showBlogsFilter: Boolean = blogsFilterCount > 0,
539→            val showTagsFilter: Boolean = tagsFilterCount > 0,
540→        ) : Parcelable
541→    }

 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    if (customListsArray.size() <= 2) {
 59→                        customListsArray.forEach { index, readerTag ->
 60→                            add(
 61→                                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 62→                                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
 63→                                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
 64→                                )
 65→                            )
 66→                        }
 67→                    } else {
 68→                        add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 69→                    }
 70→                }
 71→        }
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 75→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 76→            id = id,
 77→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 78→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 79→        )
 80→    }
 81→

 83→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(

 86→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 87→        )
 88→    }

128→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
129→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
130→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
131→            customListsMenuItems.add(
132→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
133→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
134→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
135→                )
136→            )
137→        }
138→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
139→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
140→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
141→            id = "custom-lists",
142→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
143→            children = customListsMenuItems,
144→        )
145→    }

147→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
148→
